prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy vintage wooden bar interior at night, viewed in wide landscape composition from the customer side of the counter. The scene features an elegant young barmaid sitting behind the polished L-shaped wooden bar, leaning on one elbow with one hand near her cheek, wearing a loose olive camisole and a pale headband, with long wavy platinum-blonde hair cascading over her shoulders; her face is softly obscured and featureless, as if intentionally blurred. Use warm amber lighting from exactly 4 hanging lanterns suspended from dark ceiling beams, creating cohesive golden highlights and shadows across the character, bottles, shelves, counter, and wood-paneled walls. Include exactly 3 round wooden bar stools in the foreground. Behind the character, show a dense back bar with exactly 3 main horizontal bottle shelves on the left, 1 tall ornate bottle cabinet on the right with 3 shelves, and about 55 visible liquor bottles total, mixing whiskey, sake, ceramic flasks, decanters, and small labeled glass bottles. Add bar accessories on the counter and shelves: 1 brass desk lamp on the far left, 1 small gumball or candy box, 1 bowl of citrus fruit with oranges and limes, cocktail shakers, small jars, straws, bells, and hanging utensils. On the left wall include framed vintage alcohol posters and labels; on the right include a closed wooden door with a small diamond-pattern glass window and brass hinges. Render in a hand-drawn cinematic anime background style with intricate linework, dark brown wood grain, realistic perspective, warm reflections on varnished surfaces, nostalgic speakeasy atmosphere, high detail, integrated character-and-background lighting, no modern objects, no text overlays.
